reviews.review_description: This game tell you that the answer you provide is wrong when you know its right. Example. Q, what animal is called mans best friend. We all know that it a dog. They say wrong. Another one, what demestic animal is fury and purrrs, cat that say wrong. Theres many more to. Play youll see what im talking about.
I really like this game. It's a fun battle concept.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and support! If you ever have any questions or need support, please feel free to reach out to team@skillprepare.com :)
